title: poa glauca var. elatior
intro: Poa glauca var. elatior, also known as Blue Glauca Grass, is a type of grass native to New Zealand, valued for its medicinal and herbal properties. This plant is traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and inflammation, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Poa glauca var. elatior include relief from stomach cramps, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to harness its therapeutic properties.
